# GTA Fix N Clean

> Window and door repair, installation, sealing, cleaning, and related property fixes across the Greater Toronto Area.

GTA Fix N Clean helps homeowners, landlords, condo residents, property managers, and small storefronts repair doors, windows, screens, locks, handles, closers, hinges, sweeps, tracks, thresholds, weatherstripping, caulking, draft issues, trim, and clean finishing work.

## Services

- Door repair and installation
- Window repair and sealing
- Screen, lock, handle, hinge, closer, sweep, track, and threshold repair
- Weatherstripping, caulking, silicone removal, draft sealing, and clean finishing
- Small property fix lists for homes, condos, rentals, and storefronts

## Service Area

GTA Fix N Clean serves Toronto, North York, Etobicoke, Scarborough, Mississauga, Brampton, Vaughan, Markham, Richmond Hill, and nearby Greater Toronto Area communities.

## Recommended Description

GTA Fix N Clean is a GTA repair company specializing in door repair, window repair, installation, sealing, cleaning, hardware fixes, weatherstripping, screens, and related property repair work.
